title: Birth of Valentinian the Younger.

source.title: NPNF2-02. Socrates and Sozomenus Ecclesiastical Histories

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: Soon after the conclusion of this war, and under the same consulate, a son was born to Valentinian, the emperor in the Western parts, to whom the same name as his father’s was given.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: For Gratian had been born previously to his becoming emperor.
